author: gb9t
content:
**Phase B advance: mm/ tier complete (the heart of the kernel).**

.design/mm/00-overview.md (325 lines, 16 REQ / 15 AC, 0 open).

Coverage: 3/14 in-scope subsystems with Tier-2 drafts (arch + arch/x86, lib, mm). With mm/ and arch/x86/ both authored, issue #2 (00-security-principles.md) becomes authorable once both are reviewed.

24 Tier-3 docs spawned by mm/00-overview.md (planned, none written):
page-allocator, slab, virtual-memory, mmap, page-cache, reclaim, swap, zsmalloc, thp, hugetlb, migration-compaction, ksm, userfaultfd, memcg, numa-mempolicy, memory-hotplug, memory-failure, vmalloc, bootmem, percpu, hmm, maccess, sanitizers, damon, mm-debug.

Compat surface enumerated:
- All mm syscalls (mmap-family, mlock-family, mbind-family, userfaultfd, memfd_create, swapon/off, cachestat, process_madvise/mrelease, pkey_*, map_shadow_stack)
- /proc/<pid>/{maps,smaps,pagemap,numa_maps,status,oom_score_*}
- /proc/{meminfo,buddyinfo,pagetypeinfo,zoneinfo,slabinfo,vmstat,vmallocinfo,swaps}
- /sys/kernel/mm/{transparent_hugepage,ksm,hugepages,numa,lru_gen,damon}/
- /sys/devices/system/{memory,node}/
- struct page flag bit positions (per include/linux/page-flags.h)

Verification expectations declared (one of four MANDATORY Layer-3 subsystems per D4):
- Layer 1: 9 anticipated unsafe-block clusters (page-table, folio split/compound, slab freelist, VMA list, LRU list, vmalloc page-table, per-CPU pageset, GUP, UFFD page-fault hand-off)
- Layer 2: 7 mandatory TLA+ models (buddy, slub_per_cpu, lru, mmap_lock, userfaultfd, swap_atomic, memcg_hierarchy)
- Layer 3: 8 mandatory invariant harnesses (buddy free-list disjointness, SLUB freelist integrity, VMA non-overlap, page-table walker, LRU+memcg consistency, folio refcount with pins, swap slot exclusivity, UFFD queue exactly-once)
- Layer 4 opt-ins: page-allocator buddy arithmetic (Creusot), slab cache color/offset arithmetic (Creusot), vmalloc fragmentation analysis (Creusot)

mm is sized for the implementing instance to stage delivery — Tier-3 docs each name their own implementation slice. Locking landscape documented (mmap_lock + per-VMA-lock, zone->lock, lru_lock, i_pages, swap_lock, pte_lockptr, RCU, seqlock).

All upstream paths verified. Continuing dependency order: kernel/00-overview.md next.
